notes: SHIP v1.14.299 - N-06 Rail Compass, STAGE 0 of 3 (foundation, regression-proof): landed the ONE shared 'U-span -> hole positions' source of truth and routed the cage-nut compass through it. Added EIA_HOLE_FRAC {top:0.18,mid:0.50,bot:0.82} (keeps the compass's established 18/50/82 look canonical - sensible default, quality bar does NOT shift) + function eia_holesForSpan(startU,spanU) (near L48809, above compass_render so declared-before-use; returns symbolic hole descriptors {u,pos,frac,key,cage} - each surface applies its own transform: Compass=CSS %, flat=uH(), 3D=yFor). It reuses COMPASS_RAIL_PATTERNS for 1/2/4U + an arbitrary-height fallback (cage at bottom-of-startU + top-of-endU). Rerouted the compass litSet build (was an inline COMPASS_RAIL_PATTERNS loop) to `eia_holesForSpan(startU,chassisH).forEach(h=>{if(h.cage)litSet[h.key]=true})`. Because the compass chassisH is always 1/2/4 (validated L48820), it never hits the fallback, so the lit-key set is PROVABLY IDENTICAL to before = zero visual change (the free correctness proof that the shared fn reproduces the quality bar before flat/3D consume it). JS-only, brace-balanced 11740->11748 (+8, the new fn), CRLF preserved, three-stamp .298->.299. DEVICE-VERIFY: the cage-nut Compass looks EXACTLY as before (lit holes unchanged for 1U/2U/4U chassis) - it is a pure refactor. STAGING (recon-driven, do NOT bundle): Stage 1 = flat U-map (span band + hole ticks + net-new shared selection state + loud tap handler, rd-gated in rackElevation_buildHtml, NOT locked) - READY, authorized by 'ship with sensible defaults'. Stage 2 = 3D scene (cyan span band + emissive hole-dot InstancedMesh in rackElevation_render3D, provably additive via the hlBand precedent but under the ARMED RACK SCENE LOCK) - GATED on an EXPLICIT owner go (a general 'ship it' does not clear the lock). Sensible defaults locked in: keep 18/50/82 pitch; symbolic descriptors; arbitrary-height cage = bot-startU + top-endU; selection keys on device/U-span never idx; 3D dots = one InstancedMesh MeshBasic additive, front rails only, coexist with hlBand, deselect on setExplode(false)+miss-tap. Batch device-verify .286->.299 still open.
